there is no, you're finished list building. You always have to be adding new people to the list. And one of the things that the various email service providers like a Gmail or a Hotmail or a Yahoo Mail, they're looking at all the email coming in, including all the email coming from your list and they're judging whether do we put this in the inbox or do we put it in the spam folder or even in Gmail, they've split it out even more. There's the inbox and there's the promotions tab and things like that. So they're like, where should we put this email as it's coming in? And one of the ways to get the higher score is to have a very, very clean list and have a responsive list and engage list.
